The quick commerce business in Mumbai demonstrates strong financial health and growth potential, with a remarkable year-over-year GMV growth of 45.2%. With an average of 2,500 monthly transactions and a repeat customer rate of 68%, the business showcases a solid customer base and effective retention strategies, achieving a retention rate of 72%. The average order value stands at ₹450, complemented by a low refund rate of 1.5% and no late payments, indicating reliable cash flow and operational efficiency. These factors collectively position the business as a strong candidate for GrabCredit loan eligibility.

आपका इलेक्ट्रॉनिक्स रिटेल व्यवसाय दिल्ली में 12.5% की सालाना ग्रॉस मर्चेंडाइज वैल्यू (GMV) वृद्धि के साथ मजबूत प्रदर्शन कर रहा है। आपके पास हर महीने 150 लेनदेन होते हैं, जिसमें 15% ग्राहक दोबारा खरीदारी करते हैं और 20% ग्राहक बनाए रखते हैं। औसत ऑर्डर मूल्य ₹18,000 है, जबकि लेट पेमेंट्स की संख्या 4 और रिफंड दर 8.2% है। ये आंकड़े आपके व्यवसाय की स्थिरता और विकास क्षमता को दर्शाते हैं, जो GrabCredit लोन के लिए आपकी पात्रता को मजबूत बनाते हैं।

The apparel business in Bangalore is currently experiencing a year-over-year GMV decline of 5.0%, indicating a challenging market environment. With 800 monthly transactions and a repeat customer rate of 40%, the business demonstrates a solid base of returning customers, although the customer retention rate stands at 35%. The average order value is ₹1,200, which reflects a healthy spending pattern among customers, despite a refund rate of 12.0% and only one late payment recorded. These metrics suggest that while the business faces some hurdles, it has a loyal customer base that could be leveraged for future growth.

Additionally, the business has a commendable record of zero late payments and a low refund rate of 2.5%, indicating robust financial health and customer satisfaction, making it a strong candidate for GrabCredit loan eligibility.
